## Meeting purpose

[Discuss Marcel Santilli's AI workshop and its potential integration with Maven's platform.](https://fathom.video/share/FBSsMfnMso4dAuSFuFzBPTsVa5BaJ9k4?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's AI workshop has gained significant traction (120+ participants, $1M ARR in 3 months) and he's looking to scale it through Maven](https://fathom.video/share/FBSsMfnMso4dAuSFuFzBPTsVa5BaJ9k4?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Maven offers both public and private cohort options, with features like landing page optimization and marketing support](https://fathom.video/share/FBSsMfnMso4dAuSFuFzBPTsVa5BaJ9k4?tab=summary&timestamp=479.0)
  - [Recommended format: 2-4 week course with weekly live sessions, rather than a single day workshop](https://fathom.video/share/FBSsMfnMso4dAuSFuFzBPTsVa5BaJ9k4?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
  - [Maven provides various distribution channels (trending algorithm, email campaigns) to surface courses to potential students](https://fathom.video/share/FBSsMfnMso4dAuSFuFzBPTsVa5BaJ9k4?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's AI Workshop Background

  - [Started as CMO at various companies (HashiCorp, ServiceTitan, DeepGram)](https://fathom.video/share/FBSsMfnMso4dAuSFuFzBPTsVa5BaJ9k4?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [Organized AI conferences with high-profile speakers (Sam Altman, Kevin Scott)](https://fathom.video/share/FBSsMfnMso4dAuSFuFzBPTsVa5BaJ9k4?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Launched AI workshop 3 months ago, now transitioning to full-time with GrowthX.ai](https://fathom.video/share/FBSsMfnMso4dAuSFuFzBPTsVa5BaJ9k4?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Workshop success: 120+ participants, positive feedback, $1M ARR in 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/FBSsMfnMso4dAuSFuFzBPTsVa5BaJ9k4?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Current format: 5-hour intensive session, $500 price point](https://fathom.video/share/FBSsMfnMso4dAuSFuFzBPTsVa5BaJ9k4?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)

### Maven Platform Features

  - [Landing page optimization: Maven team will review and suggest improvements](https://fathom.video/share/FBSsMfnMso4dAuSFuFzBPTsVa5BaJ9k4?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Testimonials and logos: Can be easily added to course landing page](https://fathom.video/share/FBSsMfnMso4dAuSFuFzBPTsVa5BaJ9k4?tab=summary&timestamp=659.0)
  - [Free workshops ("lightning lessons"): Recommended 30-minute format](https://fathom.video/share/FBSsMfnMso4dAuSFuFzBPTsVa5BaJ9k4?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Waitlist management: Automatic addition of free workshop attendees](https://fathom.video/share/FBSsMfnMso4dAuSFuFzBPTsVa5BaJ9k4?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
  - [Analytics: Integration with Metabase for tracking sales funnel and student engagement](https://fathom.video/share/FBSsMfnMso4dAuSFuFzBPTsVa5BaJ9k4?tab=summary&timestamp=959.0)
  - [Discount codes: Available for special offers (e.g., previous workshop attendees)](https://fathom.video/share/FBSsMfnMso4dAuSFuFzBPTsVa5BaJ9k4?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)

### Course Format Recommendations

  - [Most popular: 2-4 weeks with weekly live sessions](https://fathom.video/share/FBSsMfnMso4dAuSFuFzBPTsVa5BaJ9k4?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
  - [Weekend workshops (e.g., Saturday-Sunday) also common](https://fathom.video/share/FBSsMfnMso4dAuSFuFzBPTsVa5BaJ9k4?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
  - [Allows time for students to implement learnings between sessions](https://fathom.video/share/FBSsMfnMso4dAuSFuFzBPTsVa5BaJ9k4?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
  - [Longer formats (4-6 weeks) can command higher prices ($1,500+)](https://fathom.video/share/FBSsMfnMso4dAuSFuFzBPTsVa5BaJ9k4?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)

### Maven Distribution and Marketing

  - [Trending algorithm: Based on upcoming start date and enrollment mix](https://fathom.video/share/FBSsMfnMso4dAuSFuFzBPTsVa5BaJ9k4?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
  - [Email campaigns: Weekly course roundups and personalized AI recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/FBSsMfnMso4dAuSFuFzBPTsVa5BaJ9k4?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
  - [Lightning lesson promotion: Featured in weekly roundups and bulk signup options](https://fathom.video/share/FBSsMfnMso4dAuSFuFzBPTsVa5BaJ9k4?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
  - [Peak seasons: September and October for course sales](https://fathom.video/share/FBSsMfnMso4dAuSFuFzBPTsVa5BaJ9k4?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to complete Maven course setup within the next week](https://fathom.video/share/FBSsMfnMso4dAuSFuFzBPTsVa5BaJ9k4?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Send landing page to Claire for team review and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/FBSsMfnMso4dAuSFuFzBPTsVa5BaJ9k4?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Consider adjusting workshop format to 2-4 weeks with weekly sessions](https://fathom.video/share/FBSsMfnMso4dAuSFuFzBPTsVa5BaJ9k4?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
  - [Plan for a September/October launch to capitalize on peak learning season](https://fathom.video/share/FBSsMfnMso4dAuSFuFzBPTsVa5BaJ9k4?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
  - [Explore creation of discount codes for previous workshop attendees](https://fathom.video/share/FBSsMfnMso4dAuSFuFzBPTsVa5BaJ9k4?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
